raw_consumer_statement:
I have a Wayfair account through CitiBank credit card company. The Wayfair account shows a credit card ending in a different account that I never had a card for. I've tried to resolve this with CitiBank previously on the phone, email, etc. and they still are not providing any proof of a purchase made by me and my Wayfair account has a XXXX balance because I did pay for my prior purchases with them. I have steadily asked CitiBank to provide proof because they have not. They call and leave messages on my phone from robocalls for debt collection and I know that's illegal, especially since I've asked them to provide proof because I have been a victim of Identity Theft in the past and again recently on 2 other credit cards that scammers have made purchases that I have no clue what the items were and where they went. I am tired of CitiBank harrassing me and causing my credit score to drop. They are a scam company I do believe. 
My account online at Wayfair is a XXXX balance. When I log onto CitiBank website, they have a balance due so they are not on the same page as Wayfair and I'm tired of their scheming.
